title: Websites that convert visitors into customers.
lead: We build websites, online stores and custom systems. Modern technology (Next.js, React) with focus on speed, SEO and conversion.

seo.metaTitle: Website Design & Online Stores in the Algarve | RedDune
seo.metaDescription: Websites, online stores and custom systems for Algarve businesses. Fast, tuned for local SEO and designed to turn visitors into paying customers.

overview.title: More than a website — a business tool.
overview.lead: A beautiful website that doesn't sell isn't worth it. We design every project around your business goal: attract customers, sell products, book appointments. Everything we ship is mobile-optimised, fast to load and ready for local SEO. We mostly work with small Algarve businesses — restaurants, holiday rentals, local shops and services — that need to show up on Google and have a website that speaks for them. From domain to hosting and maintenance we handle everything, and we explain technical decisions in plain language.

items.title: Web, e-commerce and systems.
items.lead: Average price by project type. The final value depends on scope, page count, integrations and content. Detailed quote after a kick-off meeting.

list.title: Landing Page (1 page)
list.description: Single page for a campaign, lead capture, product or event launch. Goes up with integrations (CRM/email) and multilingual support.

list.title: Institutional site
list.description: Home, About, Services, Contact and anything else that makes sense. Goes up with more pages, multilingual, full SEO and content.

list.title: Online Store (E-commerce)
list.description: Catalogue, cart, payments, shipping, invoicing. Goes up with many products, variants, ERP/stock integrations and complex shipping.

list.title: Bespoke site or app
list.description: Portal, members area, ground-up custom features. Typically priced by scope, integrations and specific functionality.

list.title: Maintenance & support
list.description: Backups, updates, monitoring and small content edits. Monthly or yearly, defined with the client.

list.title: Domains, hosting & extras
list.description: Anything that's a monthly or yearly expense — domain, hosting, SSL, email. Defined separately with the client.

items.note: What raises the price: rush fee, integrations (CRM, email, ERP/stock), more elaborate copy, premium design, multilingual, more pages and broader SEO. Rush work accepted subject to availability, with an extra fee.
items.noteCtaMessage: Hi! I'd like to discuss a project.

list.q: How much does a website cost for my business?
list.a: Institutional sites typically range from 500€ to 2.000€ (depending on number of pages, multilingual, SEO and content). Landing pages between 200€ and 750€. Online stores from 1.000€. We always ask for a short meeting to understand your business before quoting.
An institutional site is ready in 2-3 weeks. E-commerce in 4-6 weeks. We always give you a concrete date in the quote.

list.q: Can I edit the site myself afterwards?
list.a: Yes. We deliver with a simple management panel where you can edit text, images and products. Training is included.

list.q: Will the site appear on Google?
list.a: We deliver with base SEO configured (meta tags, schema, sitemap, optimised performance). For competitive searches, we recommend our continued SEO package.

list.q: Do you handle hosting and the domain?
list.a: Yes, we handle everything — domain, hosting, SSL, email. These costs are monthly or yearly and are defined separately with the client, with full transparency. You can also keep your existing setup if you prefer.

cta.title: Ready to solve it?
cta.lead: Describe the problem on WhatsApp and you'll have a quote within 24h.
cta.primaryMessage: Hi! I came from the Web & Digital page.
